steps.title: Convert the percent
steps.content:
$50\%$ means one-half of a quantity. Since the question asks for $50\%$ of $840$, the calculation is the same as taking half of $840$.
$$50\%=\frac{50}{100}=\frac{1}{2}$$

steps.title: Take half of the number
steps.content:
Multiply $840$ by one-half. This gives the amount represented by $50\%$ of the original number.
$$\frac{1}{2}\cdot840=420$$
The answer is C.
